'''wofafaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:rubeanic|rubeanic]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| w-f-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:rubeanic|rubeanic]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| wofafaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:wofafithi|wofafithi]] || [[word:wofafiji|wofafiji]] || [[word:wofafishi|wofafishi]] || [[word:wofafiki|wofafiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:wofafuthuthu|wofafuthuthu]] || [[word:wofafujuju|wofafujuju]] || [[word:wofafushushu|wofafushushu]] || [[word:wofafukuku|wofafukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:wofafuthu|wofafuthu]] || [[word:wofafuju|wofafuju]] || [[word:wofafushu|wofafushu]] || [[word:wofafuku|wofafuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:wofafufthuf|wofafufthuf]] || [[word:wofafufjuf|wofafufjuf]] || [[word:wofafufshuf|wofafufshuf]] || [[word:wofafufkuf|wofafufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:wofafethe|wofafethe]] || [[word:wofafeje|wofafeje]] || [[word:wofafeshe|wofafeshe]] || [[word:wofafeke|wofafeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:wofafothotho|wofafothotho]] || [[word:wofafojojo|wofafojojo]] || [[word:wofafoshosho|wofafoshosho]] || [[word:wofafokoko|wofafokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:wofafotho|wofafotho]] || [[word:wofafojo|wofafojo]] || [[word:wofafosho|wofafosho]] || [[word:wofafoko|wofafoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:wofafofthof|wofafofthof]] || [[word:wofafofjof|wofafofjof]] || [[word:wofafofshof|wofafofshof]] || [[word:wofafofkof|wofafofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:wofafĂŻfthĂŻf|wofafĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:wofafĂŻfjĂŻf|wofafĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:wofafĂŻfshĂŻf|wofafĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:wofafĂŻfkĂŻf|wofafĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:wofafĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|wofafĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:wofafĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|wofafĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:wofafĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|wofafĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:wofafĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|wofafĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:wofafĂŻfthĂŻf|wofafĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:wofafĂŻfjĂŻf|wofafĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:wofafĂŻfshĂŻf|wofafĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:wofafĂŻfkĂŻf|wofafĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:wofafĂŻfthĂŻf|wofafĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:wofafĂŻfjĂŻf|wofafĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:wofafĂŻfshĂŻf|wofafĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:wofafĂŻfkĂŻf|wofafĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:wofafĂŠthĂŠ|wofafĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:wofafĂŠjĂŠ|wofafĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:wofafĂŠshĂŠ|wofafĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:wofafĂŠkĂŠ|wofafĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:wofafathatha|wofafathatha]] || [[word:wofafajaja|wofafajaja]] || [[word:wofafashasha|wofafashasha]] || [[word:wofafakaka|wofafakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:wofafatha|wofafatha]] || [[word:wofafaja|wofafaja]] || [[word:wofafasha|wofafasha]] || [[word:wofafaka|wofafaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:wofafafthaf|wofafafthaf]] || [[word:wofafafjaf|wofafafjaf]] || [[word:wofafafshaf|wofafafshaf]] || [[word:wofafafkaf|wofafafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:wofafasha|wofafasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:wofafshĂ«sha|wofafshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:wofafrosha|wofafrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:wofafmusha|wofafmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:wofafyasha|wofafyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gowofafnkshĂ«sha|gowofafnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gowofafnkrosha|gowofafnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gowofafnkmusha|gowofafnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gowofafnkyasha|gowofafnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:wofafafasha|wofafafasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:wofafafshĂ«sha|wofafafshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:wofafafrosha|wofafafrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:wofafafmusha|wofafafmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:wofafafyasha|wofafafyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gowofafafnkshĂ«sha|gowofafafnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gowofafafnkrosha|gowofafafnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gowofafafnkmusha|gowofafafnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gowofafafnkyasha|gowofafafnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:wefĂŠfasha|wefĂŠfasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:wefĂŠfshĂ«sha|wefĂŠfshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:wefĂŠfrosha|wefĂŠfrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:wefĂŠfmusha|wefĂŠfmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:wefĂŠfyasha|wefĂŠfyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gowefĂŠfnkshĂ«sha|gowefĂŠfnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gowefĂŠfnkrosha|gowefĂŠfnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gowefĂŠfnkmusha|gowefĂŠfnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gowefĂŠfnkyasha|gowefĂŠfnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:wofafasha|wofafasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:wofafshĂ«sha|wofafshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:wofafrosha|wofafrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:wofafmusha|wofafmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:wofafyasha|wofafyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gowofafnkshĂ«sha|gowofafnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gowofafnkrosha|gowofafnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gowofafnkmusha|gowofafnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gowofafnkyasha|gowofafnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|3a936e1}}
